str_content:
CASE REFERENCE: STR-2026-04-04-9389

REPORTING ENTITY: Union Bank of India, AML Compliance Division

SUBJECT ACCOUNTS: 
ACC05200000000013 - Nitin Sinha - Suspicious Total: INR 492575.38
ACC05200000000011 - Asha Bhosle - Suspicious Total: INR 466701.22 (INR 148597.16 + INR 162836.72 + INR 155267.34)

FRAUD PATTERN IDENTIFIED: 
The transactions indicate a possible case of dormant account reactivation and money laundering. The account ACC05200000000013, which was previously dormant, was reactivated with a large NEFT transaction to ACC05200000000011. The recipient account then made multiple rapid IMPS transactions to different accounts, indicating possible dispersal of funds.

TRANSACTION TIMELINE: 
• 2026-05-29 20:00:00: ACC05200000000013 (Nitin Sinha) to ACC05200000000011 (Asha Bhosle), INR 492575.38 via NEFT
• 2026-05-29 20:05:00: ACC05200000000011 (Asha Bhosle) to ACC05200000000007 (Hema Malhotra), INR 148597.16 via IMPS
• 2026-05-29 20:08:00: ACC05200000000011 (Asha Bhosle) to ACC05200000000029 (Usha Naik), INR 162836.72 via IMPS
• 2026-05-29 20:10:00: ACC05200000000011 (Asha Bhosle) to ACC05200000000016 (Ramesh Kumar), INR 155267.34 via IMPS
• 2026-06-28 23:00:00: ACC05200000000030 (Kishore Patil) to ACC05200000000019 (Radha Krishnan), INR 465771.33 via NEFT (unrelated transaction, but may indicate ongoing suspicious activity)

REGULATORY BASIS: 
This report is filed in accordance with Section 12 of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002 (PMLA) and Clause 4.1.1 of the Reserve Bank of India's Master Circular on Know Your Customer (KYC) Norms / Anti-Money Laundering (AML) Standards / Combating of Financing of Terrorism (CFT) / Obligation of Banks under PMLA, 2002.

RECOMMENDED ACTION: 
Account Freeze: Immediately freeze the subject accounts to prevent further suspicious transactions. 
FIU-IND goAML: File this report with the Financial Intelligence Unit - India (FIU-IND) through the goAML portal.
Refer to ED: Refer the case to the Enforcement Directorate (ED) for further investigation and possible prosecution.
Enhanced Monitoring: Continue to monitor the subject accounts and related transactions for any further suspicious activity.

RISK RATING: HIGH - The transactions indicate a high risk of money laundering and terrorist financing, given the large amounts involved and the suspicious pattern of transactions.

INVESTIGATING OFFICER: [To be assigned]

REPORT GENERATED: 2026-04-04T20:08:53.677991Z
